purpose: Issue search/resolve + release creation + project introspection
creation_url: https://sentry.io/settings/account/api/auth-tokens/ (or your org's regional URL e.g. de.sentry.io)

minimum_scope.description: Sentry supports User Auth Tokens and Internal Integration Tokens. For agents, prefer Internal Integration Tokens — they're org-scoped and revocable per integration without affecting the user account.
minimum_scope.token_type: Internal Integration (preferred) OR User Auth Token (interactive use)
scopes: release:write (only if kit triggers release creation)
minimum_scope.region: Match the org's region (us.sentry.io / de.sentry.io / etc.)
